title: On Equipment Changed
description: Allows to specify events to execute when equipment is set in the entity's default equipment slots.

slots.description: A list of slot-specific events to execute when the entity's equipment changes in those slots.
slots.title: Slots

items.description: A slot and the item that can be equipped.
items.title: Slots

slot.description: The slot number of this slot.
slot.title: Slot

on_equip.description: Event to execute when the slot is changed to a non-empty item.
on_equip.title: On Equip

on_unequip.description: Event to execute when the slot is changed to an empty item.
on_unequip.title: On Unequip
